T[0B100100]={0B10,0B1000010000001000111000,0B10100100001111001011101,0B111100111110000,0B1110011} T[0B100101]={0B100,0B10100100000010000000001,0B101011010000010000111000,0B1001001010010,0B11111111} T[0B110000]={0B11,0B101101100000001100111011,0B10101100010000101011011,0B1111101010101111,0B11100000} T[0B110001]={0B101,0B11000000000100001011,0B101000000000100001000111,0B100100101010101,0B10101100} T[0B110011]={0B110,0B1110100000001000100001,0B101110001001000111010,0B1011011111011010,0B101101} T[0B110101]={0B100,0B111010100000001100101110,0B100001010001100101111110,0B1100001000111000,0B1101111} T[0B111000]={0B100,0B11101110000001000000100,0B10000100000001101000001,0B10111100110000,0B110101} T[0B111010]={0B10,0B10011010000010000001110,0B110100100000100110000101,0B1001000011100010,0B10011111} T[0B111011]={0B100,0B101101010000000100011101,0B11000100001000111100001,0B11111100010100,0B11010111} T[0B111101]={0B10,0B100100010000001100100111,0B110101100001010100110111,0B1110010000000,0B1000111} T[0B111110]={0B1,0B101100000001100011111,0B100100001000000111001,0B1001000011000111,0B100} T[0B111111]={0B11,0B10100000000000100110111,0B111011000001111011000001,0B110101101100101,0B10111100} T[0B1000010]={0B110,0B110010000000010000111111,0B10110010001101111000,0B1111000110110,0B11000011} T[0B1000011]={0B101,0B10011110000000100011000,0B110110110000111010100110,0B11110111011101,0B10010100} T[0B1000100]={0B100,0B100010000000001000100101,0B110101110001010010100010,0B111010111101010,0B1011111} T[0B1000111]={0B1,0B101100110000000100100000,0B11100110001001011001110,0B1001011010001,0B11000000} T[0B1001000]={0B11,0B100111100000001100000111,0B101010100000010010111011,0B11101110011,0B110100} T[0B1001010]={0B1,0B111110000000001100011001,0B111010000000110101001011,0B100010010100011,0B10000} T[0B1001011]={0B110,0B1000110000001000111100,0B11110100010000010001111,0B110000011111110,0B1011001} T[0B1001100]={0B10,0B101100110000001000110110,0B101000000001110000110111,0B101111100001110,0B10011} T[0B1001110]={0B11,0B101111000000001100110001,0B100100000001101000100001,0B1111111100111111,0B101100} T[0B1010001]={0B110,0B1010010000001000010110,0B10000000000110101001101,0B1110011111010,0B1101001} H[0B100]=T local M=Ka.pk(0B110) M[0B1]=0B100100 M[0B10]=0B11110110 M[0B11]=0B10111010 M[0B100]=0B11110100 M[0B101]=0B101110 M[0B110]=0B1011101 local W=0B100000000000 local E=0B1000000000000 local m=0B10000000000000 local x=0B100000000000000 local L=0B1000000000000000 local t=0B1111100000000000 local T=0B101001101000111 local function z(L)if type(L)=="\x74\x61\x62\x6C\x65"and L[0B0]==T then local m=L[0B1] if type(m)=="\x73\x74\x72\x69\x6E\x67"then return m end local W=m or 0B0 local t=L[0B10]or 0B0 local T=L[0B11]or{} local E=Ka.sh(t) for m=0B1,t do local t=Ka.wo(W,(m-0B1)%0B1000) local t=Ka.m(W+(m*0B11101)+t+Ka.m(m*0B1011,0B11111111),0B11111111) Ka.Mj(E,m-0B1,Ka.VP(T[m],t))end m=Ka.Uw(E) L[0B1]=m L[0B10]=nil L[0B11]=nil return m end return L end local function T(T,t)local T=Ka.m((T*0B1111010001)+(t*0B10000011)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) return Ka.wo(T,t%0B11111)end local function i(T,t)local T=Ka.VP(T,Ka.LGi(T,0B1011)) return Ka.m(Ka.VP(T,(t*0B10001)+0B10100101),0B11111111)end local function p(E,m,W,T,t)return Ka.m((E*0B1011)+(m*0B10001)+W+Ka.LGi(T,0B1011)+(t*0B11),0B11111111)end local function R(T,W,t)local T=Ka.m(Ka.wo(T,W*0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local T=Ka.VP(t or 0B0,T) if Ka.m(T,0B1)~=0B0 then return-(Ka.LGi(T,0B1)+0B1)end return Ka.LGi(T,0B1)end local function F(E,O,W)local x=T(E,O) local F=Ka.VP(W,x) local L=Ka.lt(F,0B10000,0B1000) local T=i(x,O) if L~=T then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x20\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x3A\x20\x25\x73",tostring(O)),0B0)end local T=Ka.m(F,0B11111111) local m=Ka.lt(F,0B1000,0B11) local E=Ka.m(F,t) local W=Ka.VP(T,L) local T=Ka.lt(F,0B11000,0B1000) local t=p(W,m,L,E,O) if T~=t then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x20\x6D\x65\x74\x61\x3A\x20\x25\x73",tostring(O)),0B0)end return W,m,E,x end local function t(T,p,t)local T,t,i,O=F(T.g or 0B0,t,p.m or 0B0) local F={["\x53"]=T} if t==0B1 then F["\x75\x69"]=R(O,0B1,p.x)elseif t==0B10 then F["\x75\x69"]=R(O,0B1,p.x) F["\x74\x42"]=R(O,0B10,p.y)elseif t==0B11 then F["\x75\x69"]=R(O,0B1,p.x) F["\x74\x42"]=R(O,0B10,p.y) F["\x67"]=R(O,0B11,p.z)elseif t==0B100 then F["\x75\x69"]=R(O,0B1,p.x) F["\x49\x6E"]=R(O,0B10,p.y)elseif t==0B101 then F["\x47"]=R(O,0B1,p.x)end local O=p.p local t=0B1 if Ka.m(i,W)~=0B0 then F["\x4E"]=(O and O[t])or 0B0 t+=0B1 end if Ka.m(i,E)~=0B0 then F["\x54"]=z(O and O[t]) t+=0B1 end if Ka.m(i,m)~=0B0 then local T=(O and O[t])or 0B0 F["\x58\x48"]=T t+=0B1 if T>=0B1 then F["\x59"]=z(O and O[t]) t+=0B1 end if T>=0B10 then F["\x4F"]=z(O and O[t]) t+=0B1 end if T>=0B11 then F["\x51"]=z(O and O[t]) t+=0B1 end end if Ka.m(i,L)~=0B0 then F["\x6E\x78"]=(O and O[t])or((1992326/19726)==((60964+-60951)*(187276/93638)))end if Ka.m(i,x)~=0B0 then F["\x4C"]=p.c or{}end return F end local function f(j,O,Z)local Ra=Ka.pk(O["\x57\x51"]) local za=Ka.pk(O["\x57\x51"]) local W=Ka.pk(O["\x57\x51"]) local T=Ka.m((O["\x57\x51"]*0B10011)+O["\x77\x74"]+O["\x4A\x48"]+0B11000000,0B1111111111111111111111111111111) for T=0B1,O["\x57\x51"]do W[T]=T end for t=O["\x57\x51"],0B10,-0B1 do T=Ka.m((T*0B1000001110001100100111001101101)+0B11000000111001+t+O["\x58"],0B1111111111111111111111111111111) local T=(T%t)+0B1 W[t],W[T]=W[T],W[t]end for x=0B1,O["\x57\x51"]do local W=W[x] Ra[x]=W local T=O["\x6D\x79"][x] local T=t(O,T,x) local m=T["\x53"]+0B1 local L=C[m] local E=P[m] local i=Ka.m((W*0B1111010001)+(x*0B100000001)+(L*0B10001)+E+0B11000000,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local x=Ka.m(Ka.VP(i,O["\x58"]+m+L),0B11111111) local t=Ka.pk(0B100) for T=0B1,0B100 do local O=H[T][m] if O~=nil then local L=Ka.m(O[0B100]+i+T*0B10000011+E*0B10001+L*0B11101,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local W=O[0B1] local E,m if W==0B1 then local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(i,L)+x,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.VP(O[0B10],T) m=Ka.VP(O[0B11],Ka.wo(T,0B101))elseif W==0B10 then local T=Ka.m(L+Ka.wo(i,0B11)+x,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.m(O[0B10]+T,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=Ka.VP(O[0B11],Ka.W_(T,0B111))elseif W==0B11 then local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(Ka.W_(i,0B111),L)+Ka.FI(x,0B1000),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.VP(O[0B10],Ka.wo(T,0B1011)) m=Ka.m(O[0B11]+T,0B11111111111111111111111111111111)elseif W==0B100 then local T=Ka.m(L+Ka.VP(i,x*0B100000001),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.VP(O[0B10],Ka.W_(T,0B11)) m=Ka.VP(O[0B11],Ka.m(T*0B11,0B11111111111111111111111111111111))elseif W==0B101 then local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(L+x,Ka.wo(i,0B1011)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.m(O[0B10]-T,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=Ka.VP(O[0B11],Ka.wo(T,0B1101))else local T=Ka.m(L+Ka.W_(i,0B1101)+Ka.FI(x,0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.VP(O[0B10],T) m=Ka.VP(O[0B11],Ka.m((T*0B101)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111))end t[T]={Ka.VP(M[W],Ka.m(L+x+Ka.m(i,0B11111111),0B11111111)),E,m,L,O[0B101]}end end za[W]={T,t,i,x,Ka.VP(i,(L*0B100000001)+E+0B11000000)}end W=nil local function t(...)local M,Pa,G,z,T=... local K,ga=-0B1,0B1 local n=setmetatable({},{__mode="\x76\x73"}) local g=setmetatable({},{__mode="\x6B\x73"}) local Ha=((15*13)==((12*674237)/(17*2333))) local fa,oa local Ma,Ga,Ca,Da local ja=0B11 local H=function()do local T=fa local W=Ka.m(((0B100100+0B110001111110111)*0B1011011)+0B101101010+0B1011,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local E=0B11100011 local t=0B11110111 while(((45912+-45883)*(290499/96833))==(3205254/36842))do if E==0B11100011 then t=0B10001000 local T=Ka.m(W+0B1000100,0B11111111) if Ka.m((T*0B11)+0B1001,0B11111)==Ka.m((Ka.VP(T,0B0)*0B11)+0B1001,0B11111)then E=0B10001000 else E=0B111000 end elseif E==0B111000 then local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(W,0B1010001001110001011)+0B10000111110,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) W=Ka.m(Ka.VP(T,Ka.wo(T,0B1111)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) if Ka.m(T,0B11)==Ka.m(Ka.VP(T,0B0),0B11)then E=t else E=t end elseif E==0B10001000 then do do local T=T local T=ga ga=T end end W=Ka.m(W+0B110000111+Ka.wo(W,0B10001),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=0B11110111 elseif E==0B11110111 then break else E=0B11110111 end end end end local L=function()do local T=fa local t=Pa local E=Ka.m(((0B10101+0B11110111000110)*0B10110110)+0B100001011+0B101,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local m=0B11101100 local W=0B11011100 while((9*7)==(7*9))do if m==0B11101100 then W=0B11101101 local T=Ka.m(E+0B110011,0B11111111) if Ka.m((T*0B11)+0B10000,0B11111)==Ka.m((Ka.VP(T,0B0)*0B11)+0B10000,0B11111)then m=0B11101101 else m=0B1000 end elseif m==0B1000 then local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(E,0B110010001100001110)+0B1100100001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=Ka.m(Ka.VP(T,Ka.wo(T,0B100)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) if Ka.m(T,0B11)==Ka.m(Ka.VP(T,0B0),0B11)then m=W else m=W end elseif m==0B11101101 then do do local T=T t[T["\x75\x69"]]=T["\x54"]end end E=Ka.m(E+0B100101000+Ka.wo(E,0B110),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=0B11011100 elseif m==0B11011100 then break else m=0B11011100 end end end end local E=function()do local W=Ka.m(((0B11111+0B1100101000010)*0B1111111)+0B101100100+0B11,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local E=0B11011111 local T=0B100100 while(((61794/30897)*(3*9))==(3*18))do if E==0B11011111 then T=0B10011 local T=Ka.m(W+0B1001111,0B11111111) if Ka.m((T*0B11)+0B10110,0B11111)==Ka.m((Ka.VP(T,0B0)*0B11)+0B10110,0B11111)then E=0B10011 else E=0B1111100 end elseif E==0B1111100 then local t=Ka.m(Ka.VP(W,0B10100100001011010)+0B10000101100,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) W=Ka.m(Ka.VP(t,Ka.wo(t,0B1110)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) if Ka.m(t,0B11)==Ka.m(Ka.VP(t,0B0),0B11)then E=T else E=T end elseif E==0B10011 then do end W=Ka.m(W+0B110000001+Ka.wo(W,0B10000),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) E=0B100100 elseif E==0B100100 then break else E=0B100100 end end end end local m=function()do local t=fa local T=Pa local E=Ka.m(((0B110111+0B110000101011100)*0B10111011)+0B110000101+0B110,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local m=0B11110 local W=0B11000100 while((60085+-60020)==((33290-22179)+(81967-93013)))do if m==0B11110 then W=0B1100101 local T=Ka.m(E+0B11000010,0B11111111) if Ka.m((T*0B11)+0B11000,0B11111)==Ka.m((Ka.VP(T,0B0)*0B11)+0B11000,0B11111)then m=0B1100101 else m=0B10110100 end elseif error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end ja=L local T=t() if T~=nil then return Ka.Wi(T,0B1,T.n)end i=0B1000101 elseif i==0B10111010 then local t=t local T=t[0B100] local E=t[0B101] local m,W local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(Ka.W_(Ga,0B111),T)+Ka.FI(Ca,0B1000),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=Ka.VP(t[0B10],Ka.wo(T,0B1011)) W=Ka.m(t[0B11]-T,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) local x=Ka.m(m,0B11111111) local L=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B1000),0B111) local T=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B10000),0B11111111) local t=Pa(x) if L==0B0 or t==nil then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(x)),0B0)end if T~=Ka.m((x*0B111)+(L*0B10011)+E,0B11111111)then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end local T=Ka.BNR(Ka.m((x*0B10000011)+(L*0B10001)+(E*0B11)+0B1010111,0B1111111111111111),Ka.FI(Ka.m(Ka.VP(E,T),0B11111111),0B10000)) if W~=T then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end ja=L local T=t() if T~=nil then return Ka.Wi(T,0B1,T.n)end i=0B1000101 elseif i==0B11110100 then local W=t local T=W[0B100] local E=W[0B101] local x,t local T=Ka.m(T+Ka.VP(Ga,Ca*0B100000001),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) x=Ka.VP(W[0B10],Ka.W_(T,0B11)) t=Ka.VP(W[0B11],Ka.m(T*0B11,0B11111111111111111111111111111111)) local m=Ka.m(x,0B11111111) local L=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(x,0B1000),0B111) local T=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(x,0B10000),0B11111111) local W=Pa(m) if L==0B0 or W==nil then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(m)),0B0)end if T~=Ka.m((m*0B111)+(L*0B10011)+E,0B11111111)then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end local T=Ka.BNR(Ka.m((m*0B10000011)+(L*0B10001)+(E*0B11)+0B1110100,0B1111111111111111),Ka.FI(Ka.m(Ka.VP(E,T),0B11111111),0B10000)) if t~=T then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end ja=L local T=W() if T~=nil then return Ka.Wi(T,0B1,T.n)end i=0B1000101 elseif i==0B101110 then local t=t local T=t[0B100] local E=t[0B101] local m,W local T=Ka.m(Ka.VP(T+Ca,Ka.wo(Ga,0B1011)),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=Ka.m(t[0B10]+T,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) W=Ka.VP(t[0B11],Ka.wo(T,0B1101)) local L=Ka.m(m,0B11111111) local x=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B1000),0B111) local T=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B10000),0B11111111) local t=Pa(L) if x==0B0 or t==nil then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(L)),0B0)end if T~=Ka.m((L*0B111)+(x*0B10011)+E,0B11111111)then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end local T=Ka.BNR(Ka.m((L*0B10000011)+(x*0B10001)+(E*0B11)+0B10010001,0B1111111111111111),Ka.FI(Ka.m(Ka.VP(E,T),0B11111111),0B10000)) if W~=T then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end ja=x local T=t() if T~=nil then return Ka.Wi(T,0B1,T.n)end i=0B1000101 elseif i==0B1011101 then local W=t local T=W[0B100] local E=W[0B101] local m,t local T=Ka.m(T+Ka.W_(Ga,0B1101)+Ka.FI(Ca,0B101),0B11111111111111111111111111111111) m=Ka.VP(W[0B10],T) t=Ka.VP(W[0B11],Ka.m((T*0B101)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111)) local L=Ka.m(m,0B11111111) local x=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B1000),0B111) local T=Ka.m(Ka.LGi(m,0B10000),0B11111111) local W=Pa(L) if x==0B0 or W==nil then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(L)),0B0)end if T~=Ka.m((L*0B111)+(x*0B10011)+E,0B11111111)then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end local T=Ka.BNR(Ka.m((L*0B10000011)+(x*0B10001)+(E*0B11)+0B10101110,0B1111111111111111),Ka.FI(Ka.m(Ka.VP(E,T),0B11111111),0B10000)) if t~=T then error(Ka.nK("\x63\x6F\x72\x72\x75\x70\x74\x65\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73\x2F\x25\x73",tostring(Da),tostring(ja)),0B0)end ja=x local T=W() if T~=nil then return Ka.Wi(T,0B1,T.n)end i=0B1000101 else error(Ka.nK("\x69\x6E\x76\x61\x6C\x69\x64\x3A\x20\x25\x73",tostring(i)),0B0)end end end local function T(...)local m=Ka.B_(...) local W=Ka.pk(O["\x58"]) local E={["\x5F"]=0B0,["\x68"]={}} Ka.IJ(m,0B1,O["\x4A\x48"],0B0,W) if O["\x4A\x48"]<m.n then local T=O["\x4A\x48"]+0B1 local t=m.n-O["\x4A\x48"] E["\x5F"]=t Ka.IJ(m,T,T+t-0B1,0B1,E["\x68"])end m=nil local T={["\x48"]=0B0} local t=Ka.B_(pcall(t,T,W,O["\x4D"],O["\x6D\x79"],E)) if t[0B1]then return Ka.Wi(t,0B10,t.n)else local W=t[0B10]or"" local t=z(O["\x64\x69"])or"\x28\x3F\x3F\x29" if O["\x6C"]then return error(Ka.nK("\x47\x6F\x6F\x66\x56\x4D\x20\x45\x72\x72\x6F\x72\x20\x25\x73\x3A\x25\x73\x3A\x20\x25\x73",t,O["\x4A"][T["\x48"]],W),0B0)else if t~="\x28\x3F\x3F\x29"then return error(Ka.nK("\x47\x6F\x6F\x66\x56\x4D\x20\x45\x72\x72\x6F\x72\x20\x25\x73\x3A\x20\x25\x73",t,W),0B0)else return error(Ka.nK("\x25\x73",W),0B0)end end end end return T end return f(q,O)end;IJ=table.move;jx=coroutine.close;AMB=coroutine.create;Aw=0B0;cg=buffer.readu8;W_=bit32.rrotate;LGi=bit32.rshift;rOm=0B10010110001100011;lWa=function(T)return function()return T.m(T:_Hj(),0B11111111)end end;VP=bit32.bxor;Lp=bit32.bnot;RI=utf8.char;NxQ=string.char;sh=buffer.create;X_=table.concat;ec=buffer.readstring;P=function(t,T)return t:LMY(t:yBs(t.se),T)end;_Hj=function(t)local T=(t.kD-t.wo(t.W,0B11011))%0B100000000000000000000000000000000 t.kD=(t.VP(t.W,t.wo(t.rOm,0B10001)))%0B100000000000000000000000000000000 t.W=(t.rOm+t.Jl)%0B100000000000000000000000000000000 t.rOm=(t.Jl+T)%0B100000000000000000000000000000000 t.Jl=(T+t.kD)%0B100000000000000000000000000000000 return t.Jl end;wkZ=utf8.codes;wo=bit32.lrotate;Rm=buffer.writestring;kD=0B1100111010011110110111000011011;Jr={};Nq=buffer.readf64;se=[=[ISS@XRD/U{r}*G/If}QH&G:7R)rDEcrJRvd+gbfex!OaIt*35zh=S:cUaaMZ!3&+G^+GS^)Y-k2{:zIyTzIP]]nv>!^NA[bIN*e<?+9+VEn*Q<jPH(NJYmhdg})7R:^+fFsxEPxY$iQ+utW.9c.Zc/YSt<e5!8yR8=MgTOUf%Z?<@Pi@$1LW]d(>qTlk$*r9lt.x%12)]$mT9N?mb/Vc/)JdMalS{]N5C&tTIU{C>0<sPg<R?}%oFmbA+1i3l6:H56BUF6p@sF^}UPs9m+Lp(TRyYp1<.:H^K0DYq*QSwOR$][FQU3]}s6Cajw7WAp5i^DA0PZDYb)pRIg0K/uv{YM%@!gQD}rVE(W{uy[TSL4XW)e?2gS/sz<be&5aHB%Hhtdf^v$t-cB?)(6o&nB7n#wM&18)]Ty?ocNpVOKK9VV:cl8?h4Fcg0Z3!AMsY1/#rhI]Wpz#7)jvHPVW!oct/Pw/}49<yThZfxz[yEp(XE>f==v{q!#SzgPc5/T]K!mYALy/XFQQ/}ZdQsG-@(trCqu1g4lFS*@?-TM7c.ogeBO+k.GBW/e/Kr2-erG2V&xqCO85v/p=K1{]yd5kV>i?mBoNjT?P}zuc}WA{pQJ+NPAi*VwUf[1pWR7B5tWUr6=d[Uu}F0Myn!qYYeB3U0}eTXI/MYI3%T&icz/glv[Bt<$n(*<j0O9FAf^8DlVa(O#D&M>{rw#H2Zm?-:Hy8F5NX#jC1)4oYrDX.l^aDr+1>$ch^K1ZYiuFGD5r*3}d1B=WSMWMqZ8<wsE?GXb}4%!?LMw=7bMV9g($IKuNd@RK&b}S%hOZt@R>-lH-r=TX0]&UwbT}5wm7cK8m63do$+UzzWH?w^Q}3+h?J)xaCY@upe:gq.wh]bNBR<t@4i5Efoyab.[M=bht74<Tz<Hb236RgEdN)[d7n{3udj{C%XbXTFk2hpOP^HG>TArR1!Ndk^0#8GGHg&d%SHq&BFgWU2cg)I:8jL^?Abi<+:Fp5k(Cj}W)08Ry]jaINJTKa!iwt9$uesPLKERB[F3k)CzEcxPbi8rRbQXGflSGEz4$LC#td}n]4uN1Anw/DYsKHFJdSzUR:!3Xv@j?Q2hZJ<5*8[HVB:Z0=TZFM@X4$Y^HT]2}I98R)2tFHS.ePeqUvryCFdXJ}[{aCU(>d[3mLrlnn3v53LiB6(hso<3LAi{&sr:/[8QR*TmGTA4oztkJ1:8Kh{uJ9H*^pKXE8{Uv8%bMIZ!HlunR-P#hRhu&#Ru/tz$h]mOu}@=*-W7Gt{uNc6Y5*:#4sCXptn(ZKMHq!SN-A8%L=Ne7#c28n=CP)N%>Z3HexW@hgk(wKfHxuWL.Y-Zv$?*h+=j3jMU?&nI*)Pq}TN4Ki.6p7$>=ve-2yw%NGBI39g8.uSOSxXq*Wc-uV-6z9*x2xt(o:$nRqCG*&x^}1?5-vv]hXltz&5[U>s[t!SHpPLJ{M8rc[.870!^[=^0Q(B}A}$(Vg<d]1G[DmKG#zpL/nT0Wq.VrS+<*-(mH?XqKYv.9cpk5=k%Ur&}t70I0?dw5my}#5K/4La}uqW-.PeJsueI4SboTmoiKs&SUO$esVb0lk]K#KQ/F*j28)%ugJrhGClbx}.u{ZiVjWLXw8.vwC<wAsc6CnCIbUP3u96.=@b^0ioC4k$D:A^7ty8sv+Hj4Q2JG0}33.QZ=T3jTfe/2}5N(kaBc0?wLl6[r)j5sj(QWR6C]O%OT=]ne4[TLc=Tm)YZeFAI&M2c6jnE?2O.945:4a$B]r*)pd1.g%M9}=*2]1M?X0<bLL!&2$/QfB{%xJjy&jwiG9b1bc]uV5dWs%lf#4U0XBRsc$!!y{Ey}to^g{S:h+Jaj@G6n/4Ap(R@aE7M-2Bvfie2k{QIOG/RY T,T in b.wkZ(b.hA)do local T=b.RI(T) b.fH[b.Aw]=T b.Jr[T]=b.Aw b.Aw=b.Aw+0B1 end T=b:VyP(T) local m=b:lWa() local u=b.JUM(T) local Q=0B0 local R=0B10010011 local o=0B11100100 local P=0B110 local D=0B100000000000 local K=0B1000000000000 local f=0B10000000000000 local M=0B100000000000000 local g=0B1000000000000000 local F=0B1111100000000000 local C=0B101001101000111 local q=0B0 local z=0B1 local H=0B10 local O=0B11 local p=0B100 local i=0B101 local x=0B110 local E=0B111 local B local G local j local function S(T)error(b.nK("failed: %s",T),0B0)end local function T(T)if b.m(T,0B1)~=0B0 then return-(b.LGi(T,0B1)+0B1)end return b.LGi(T,0B1)end local function n()local T=b.cg(u,Q) Q+=0B1 return b.VP(T,m())end local W=b.sh(0B100) local t=b.sh(0B1000) local function l()local W=0B0 local T=0B0 while((40195+-39998)==(45145-44948))do local t=n() W=b.BNR(W,b.FI(b.m(t,B),T)) T+=j if b.m(t,G)==0B0 then break end end return W end local function Z()return T(l())end local function T()local T=l() if T==0B0 then return""end local t=b.sh(T) for T=0B0,T-0B1 do b.Mj(t,T,b.VP(b.cg(u,Q),m())) Q+=0B1 end return b.Uw(t)end local function L()for T=0B0,0B111 do b.Mj(t,T,b.VP(b.cg(u,Q),m())) Q+=0B1 end return b.Nq(t,0B0)end local function J()for T=0B0,0B11 do b.Mj(W,T,b.VP(b.cg(u,Q),m())) Q+=0B1 end return b.uN(W,0B0)end local function W(T,t)local T=b.m((T*0B1111010001)+(t*0B10000011)+0B10011110001101110111100110111001,0B11111111111111111111111111111111) return b.wo(T,t%0B11111)end local function m(t,T)local t=b.VP(t,b.LGi(t,0B1011)) return b.m(b.VP(t,(T*0B10001)+0B10100101),0B11111111)end local function t(T,t,E,m,W)return b.m((T*0B1011)+(t*0B10001)+E+b.LGi(m,0B1011)+(W*0B11),0B11111111)end local function T(T,L,E)local T=W(T,L) local i=b.VP(E,T) local x=b.lt(i,0B10000,0B1000) local T=m(T,L) if x~=T then S("meta_key")end local T=b.m(i,0B11111111) local E=b.lt(i,0B1000,0B11) local m=b.m(i,F) local W=b.VP(T,x) local T=b.lt(i,0B11000,0B1000) local t=t(W,E,x,m,L) if T~=t then S("meta_tag")end return W,E,m end local function m()local T=n() if T==q then return nil elseif T==z then return((42543-42510)==((143189-72075)+(28289+-99240)))elseif T==H then return((4271400/76275)==((23240/5810)*(816480/58320)))elseif T==O then return L()elseif T==p then local W=l() local T=n() local t=b.pk(W) for T=0B1,W do t[T]=n()end return{[0B0]=C,T,W,t}elseif T==i then local T=l() local t=b.pk(T) for T=0B1,T do t[T]=Z()end return t elseif T==x then local t,E,T,W=J(),J(),J(),J() return{x=t,y=E,z=T,w=W}elseif T==E then return Z()end S("value_tag")end local W=n() local t=n() if W~=R or t~=o then S("mismatch_1")end local t=n() if t~=P then S("mismatch_2")end local t=n() if t<0B1 or t>0B111 then S("invalid_1")end B=b.FI(0B1,t)-0B1 G=b.m(b.Lp(B),0B11111111) j=t local t=l() local W=b.pk(t) for t=0B1,t do local O={["I"]=b.pk(0B0),["WG"]=0B0,["J"]=nil} O.g=l() O["WQ"]=l() O["my"]=b.pk(O["WQ"]) O["V"]=b.pk(O["WQ"]) for W=0B1,O["WQ"]do local t=l() local T,E,L=T(O.g,W,t) local x={m=t} local t=nil local i=0B1 if E==0B1 then x.x=l()elseif E==0B10 then x.x=l() x.y=l()elseif E==0B11 then x.x=l() x.y=l() x.z=l()elseif E==0B100 then x.x=l() x.y=l()elseif E==0B101 then x.x=l()end if b.m(L,b.BNR(b.BNR(D,K),b.BNR(f,g)))~=0B0 then t={}end if b.m(L,D)~=0B0 then t[i]=Z() i=i+0B1 end if b.m(L,K)~=0B0 then t[i]=m() i=i+0B1 end if b.m(L,f)~=0B0 then local T=l() t[i]=T i=i+0B1 for T=0B1,T do t[i]=m() i=i+0B1 end end if b.m(L,g)~=0B0 then t[i]=n()==0B1 end if t~=nil then x.p=t end if b.m(L,M)~=0B0 then local T=l() local t=b.pk(T) for T=0B1,T do t[T]={["ui"]=n(),["tB"]=l()}end x.c=t end O["my"][W]=x O["V"][W]=T end O["UZ"]=l() O["M"]=b.pk(O["UZ"]) for T=0B1,O["UZ"]do O["M"][T]=l()+0B1 end O["X"]=l() O["JH"]=l() O["wt"]=l() local T=n() O["Cm"]=b.m(T,0B1)~=0B0 O["l"]=b.m(T,0B10)~=0B0 O["di"]=m()or"(??)" if O["l"]then O["J"]=b.pk(O["WQ"]) local t=0B0 for T=0B1,O["WQ"]do t+=l() O["J"][T]=t end else O["J"]=nil end W[t]=O end local T=l() local t=W[T+0B1] if t==nil then S(b.nK("invalid index %s",tostring(T)))end t["di"]="(main)" return{F=W,wO=t}end;B_=table.pack;eLP=buffer.copy;vgN=table.remove;uN=buffer.readf32;hA="0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ.-:+=^!/*?&<>()[]{}@%$#";ck=buffer.writef32;eb=coroutine.yield}):P(getfenv(0B1))(...)
